create_name_prompt:
Step 1/2 — Campaign Name Give this link a name so you know which source it represents.
Examples: • Instagram Bio • YouTube Description • Friends & Family • October Promo
Or skip to create an unnamed link:
create_success_hint: Share this link anywhere — social media, bios, videos, or direct messages. New subscribers who tap it are tracked automatically.
create_tags_prompt:
Step 2/2 — Auto-Tags Enter tags to automatically apply to every subscriber who joins through this link. Useful for segmenting your audience by source.
Example: vip, instagram, promo2024 Separate multiple tags with commas. Subscribers won't see these tags — they're for your use only in filters and conditions.
Or skip to create with no tags:
entry_body: Choose what you'd like to manage:
leaderboard_empty: No subscriber referrals yet. Enable Subscriber Sharing and add a Referral Link button to your menu so subscribers can start sharing.
leaderboard_title: {e_leaderboard} Top Referrers Subscribers who've brought the most new people to your bot. Reward your top performers with exclusive content or tags using Conditions.
limit_hint: Upgrade your plan to create more referral links.
menu_title:
{e_referral} Referral Links Track exactly where your new subscribers come from. Every referral link records clicks and conversions automatically — no setup beyond creating the link.
{e_broadcast} Campaign Links — created by you to track specific sources (Instagram bio, YouTube description, ad campaigns, etc.). {e_referral} Subscriber Sharing — let every subscriber generate their own personal invite link to share with friends.
name_too_long: {e_warning} Campaign name must be 100 characters or fewer. Try a shorter name:
no_links: No campaign links yet. Create your first link and start tracking which source brings the most subscribers.
referrer_notify: {e_party} New referral! {name} just joined your bot through your referral link! Your total referrals: {count} {e_high_five} Keep sharing your link to keep growing — every referral counts!
sub_sharing_title:
{e_referral} Subscriber Sharing When enabled, every subscriber gets their own unique personal invite link. They can share it anywhere — and you can track how many people each subscriber brings in.
How to give subscribers access to their link: • In any button menu, add a button with action type Referral Link — subscribers tap it to receive their personal link. • Use the referral count in Conditions to unlock content or send rewards when a subscriber hits a milestone (e.g. 5 referrals → send a VIP message). • Combine with keyword triggers for automated referral campaigns. {e_light_bulb} Subscriber links are separate from your Campaign Links — this is peer-to-peer sharing by your audience, not tracking links you create.
